ENDEAVOR PLUS 2024-2025

Extracurricular Programs that Educate and Inspire

Find Your School

Our Locations

Endeavor Plus is available to currently enrolled families at over 50 of our Endeavor Schools across the United States.

View Available Schools

Registration

We've made registering for Endeavor Plus a quick and simple process. Begin by finding your school and creating an account on their Popsicle website.

Find Your School

Our Programs

Active Athletes

Designed to give students the basic skills, techniques and knowledge they need to take on fun-filled sports such as soccer, golf, football, lacrosse and more! Our students will have a ball building life-long friendships through teamwork and determination.

Art

Students are guided through individual and group projects to build their sense of imagination and their ability to create and construct. These fantastic lessons stimulate children’s creativity and encourage them to explore – all while having lots of FUN!

Dance Stars

We are channeling all of our creativity through the art of ballet. Dancers will have the opportunity to learn the 7 basic movements of ballet as well as core terminology and several graceful positions! Enjoy a petit performance by our ballerinas and ballerinos at the end of the year to show off their hard work.

STEM

Students will learn the ins and outs of the groundbreaking science and technologies changing our world every day! Throughout this program, our curious learners will grow into innovative entrepreneurs. With a wide-variety of subjects, students are more likely to find a field that sparks their interest.

Tot Hop

Together we will work with our tiny tots on gross motor skills, coordination and strength through weekly planned activities that are energetic and engaging. Movement is key to boosting mood and brain development: an active child is a happy child!

Ready to register? Begin by accessing your school page!

Find Your School
